evidence.claim: Used QLoRA, Kubeflow, YOLO, Elasticsearch, PyTorch, OpenSearch, LlamaIndex, Weaviate, Milvus, Qdrant, scikit-learn, and Java
evidence.source_text: Skills: QLoRA... Kubeflow... YOLO... Elasticsearch... PyTorch... OpenSearch... LlamaIndex... Weaviate... Milvus... Qdrant... scikit-learn... Java

evidence.claim: Developed semantic search feature for 500K documents using sentence-transformers and FAISS
evidence.source_text: Developed a semantic search feature for an internal knowledge base of ~500K documents. Used sentence-transformers (all-MiniLM-L6-v2 initially, later upgraded to bge-base) with FAISS

evidence.claim: Implemented RAG-based chatbot with document ingestion pipeline, Pinecone, and GPT-4/fine-tuned models
evidence.source_text: Implemented a RAG-based customer support chatbot... Built the document ingestion pipeline (chunking, embedding via OpenAI embeddings, storing in Pinecone) and the answer-generation layer (initially GPT-4, then a fine-tuned smaller model for cost control).

evidence.claim: Improved search-relevance by 35% over Elasticsearch BM25
evidence.source_text: Reported search-relevance improvement of 35% over the prior Elasticsearch BM25 setup

evidence.claim: Reduced average ticket resolution time by 31%
evidence.source_text: Deployment cut average ticket resolution time by 31% for the supported categories.

evidence.claim: Owns the evaluation framework for RAG features
evidence.source_text: Recently, I shipped our first RAG-based feature this year and now own the eval framework for it.

evidence.claim: Designed evaluation framework with automatic metrics and human-in-the-loop scores
evidence.source_text: Designed the evaluation framework with both automatic metrics (BLEU, ROUGE) and human-in-the-loop quality scores.

evidence.claim: Prioritizes evaluation rigor and offline benchmarks
evidence.source_text: I care a lot about evaluation rigor — too many teams ship models without offline benchmarks they trust.

evidence.claim: Values practical experience over theoretical background
evidence.source_text: My academic background is in CS/ML but my main learning has come from shipping real systems and seeing what holds up under production load.
